arts.ttl: Schmidt of team's performance against Chelsea: "I can accept defeats like this."
arts.sum: FC Heidenheim trainer Frank Schmidt declared himself satisfied with his team's performance despite Thursday night's home conference league defeat to Chelsea FC.

arts.ttl: Filip Jorgensen will get all the credit but 61-touch star was Chelsea’s real hero vs Heidenheim - opinion
Enzo Maresca promises more chances for Chelsea fringe players in busy schedule
arts.sum: The Blues were 2-0 winners over Heidenheim in the Conference League.

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez and Moises Caicedo react to Chelsea’s 2-0 win against Heidenheim
arts.sum: Thoughts on the win Chelsea fans?

arts.ttl: Heidenheim vs Chelsea Conference League score predicted to see if unbeaten run continues
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to make it four wins from four in the Conference League later today when they take on German side FC Heidenheim. An 8-0 win over FC Noah in Chelsea's last Conference League game saw the Blues continue their winning start to the competition, with Maresca's side currently top of the table with a whopping +13 goal difference after just three games.

arts.ttl: Chelsea legend Frank Lampard explains what is a 'risk' after Coventry announcement
arts.sum: Lampard has been out of work since leaving Chelsea in May last year, where he returned to the club temporarily following Graham Potter's dismissal. Chelsea legend Frank Lampard has admitted his return to management is a "risk" after being named head coach at Coventry.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive new VAR verdict after controversial penalty appeal vs Heidenheim
arts.sum: Peter Crouch and Joe Cole both agreed that it was the right decision to overturn Chelsea's penalty claim against Heidenheim in the UEFA Conference League. Cole praised the decision from the official, he told TNT Sports: "We don’t often see [them sticking to their guns] so credit to the ref there.

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings as Jorgensen fantastic and Nkunku superb vs Heidenheim
arts.sum: The visitors, though, did take the lead early on in the second-half with Christopher Nkunku firing past Kevin Muller to make it one-nil. The Blues thought they had a penalty around 35 minutes in as the referee pointed to the spot after Mykhailo Mudryk went down in the box.

arts.ttl: Five things we learned from Chelsea's 2-0 victory against Heidenheim in the Conference League
arts.sum: Chelsea came through a tricky trip to Germany in midweek to end up on the right end of a 2-0 scoreline against Heidenheim. Chelsea remain...

arts.ttl: Move over Sanchez! Jorgensen heroics proves he is Chelsea's BEST goalkeeper
arts.sum: However, the arrival of Maresca saw Petrovic loaned out and Sanchez selected as Chelsea’s starting goalkeeper but the 27-year-old has already made three errors leading to a goal – the joint-most of any player in the Premier League. Despite spending more than €1 billion on players in recent years, Chelsea have struggled to find a consistently safe pair of hands in goal and the presence of Sanchez has appeared to be more of a convenient stopgap rather than a belief in the Spaniard’s credentials to be the long-term number one.
